# Letermovir 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Letermovir 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Letermovir</strong> 目前有 <strong>25 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Letermovir 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Prevymis is indicated for prophylaxis of cytomegalovirus (CMV) reactivation and disease in adult and paediatric patients weighing at least 5 kg who are CMV-seropositive recipients [R+] of an...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>vulvovaginal candidiasis（99.9%）</li>
<li>fungal infectious disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>tinea nigra（98.6%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（98.5%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（98.5%）</li>
<li>anogenital human papillomavirus infection（98.0%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（98.0%）</li>
<li>AIDS（97.9%）</li>
<li>dermatophytosis（97.7%）</li>
<li>piedra（97.2%）</li>
<li>varicella zoster infection（96.9%）</li>
<li>congenital human immunodeficiency virus（96.9%）</li>
<li>AIDS related complex（96.9%）</li>
<li>postmenopausal atrophic vaginitis（96.5%）</li>
<li>vulvovaginitis（96.1%）</li>
<li>roseolovirus infectious disease（95.7%）</li>
<li>vulvitis（95.6%）</li>
<li>mycotic corneal ulcer（95.5%）</li>
<li>commissural lip fistula（95.4%）</li>
<li>burning mouth syndrome（95.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/letermovir/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
